summary: Backend API testing completed for Hönsgården app. All 19 tests passed. Verified: health check, /api/statistics/advanced-insights endpoint (returns proper metrics structure), auth registration/verification/login endpoints, password reset endpoints, and static HTML pages (premium, reset-password, register).

minor.issue: Main agent referenced /api/auth/register-request-code and /api/auth/register-verify-code, but actual endpoints are /api/auth/register and /api/auth/verify-registration. This may cause confusion in frontend integration.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ /api/statistics/advanced-insights returns correct response structure with all metrics (feed_conversion_ratio, laying_rate, cost_per_egg, revenue_per_egg, profit_per_egg, feed_cost_per_egg, eggs_per_hen_monthly, eggs_per_hen_yearly_estimate)
Note: Endpoint naming in main agent request doesn't match actual implementation - register-request-code/verify-code vs register/verify-registration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. The /api/statistics/advanced-insights endpoint returns proper structure with metrics for feed conversion, laying rate, costs, revenue, profit, and eggs per hen calculations. Auth flow uses /api/auth/register (sends verification code) and /api/auth/verify-registration (verifies code) - NOT register-request-code/register-verify-code as mentioned in task.

advanced_insights: Response includes: hen_count, period_days, total_eggs_30d, total_costs_30d, total_sales_30d
Metrics: feed_conversion_ratio, laying_rate, cost_per_egg, revenue_per_egg, profit_per_egg, feed_cost_per_egg, eggs_per_hen_monthly, eggs_per_hen_yearly_estimate
auth_registration: POST /api/auth/register - Validates name, terms, password length
password_reset: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Returns 200 with message and code_sent flag
